description_long: This delivery robot features a boxy, rectangular body with rounded edges, predominantly painted in a pastel blue color with beige accents. It stands on two articulated, mechanical legs, each ending in a flat, rectangular foot with black and beige segments, suggesting stability and traction for urban navigation. The top of the robot has a dome-shaped lid and a cylindrical beige-and-white module, possibly for sensors or communication, along with a thin antenna. The front face is equipped with a large, circular black lens or sensor, likely for navigation or object detection, and a vented beige panel below it. Small details such as visible screws, panel seams, and a side vent indicate access points for maintenance or cargo. The overall design is utilitarian yet friendly, suitable for autonomous delivery tasks in city environments.
description: A pastel blue and beige delivery robot with a boxy body, two articulated legs, a dome top, and a prominent front sensor lens.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rectangular body, cylindrical module, antenna, and one articulated leg with a flat foot.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large circular sensor lens, vented beige panel, and both legs with their feet visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other leg and the cylindrical module on top.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the flat back panel, cylindrical module, antenna, and both legs from behind.
attribute_compartment_access_panel: A rectangular access panel is visible on the side of the body, with a small vent and possible handle, suitable for accessing the cargo compartment.
